data.change_summary: Addressed all 4 pending amendments. (1) Added tracing::warn! to unique_terminal_replay_match (fs.rs:2832-2837) when requested_run_id is Some but requested_started_at is None, making the contract violation diagnosable in production logs before returning None. (2) Added merge_attempt_entries_fills_all_optional_fields round-trip coverage test to model.rs — constructs a primary with all optional fields None and a secondary with all fields populated, merges, asserts every optional field is filled from secondary; then verifies existing non-None values on primary are NOT overwritten by secondary. (3) Removed new-row auto-population of plan_hash from snapshot in record_task_run_start (fs.rs:3039): effective_plan_hash now uses only plan_hash.map(str::to_owned), never falling back to the snapshot. snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation still records the snapshot hash for provenance, enabling safe_plan_hash_backfill during later finalization when the plan hasn't evolved. (4) Replaced the None-provenance backfill branch in safe_plan_hash_backfill (fs.rs:2608-2616) with an unconditional return false — legacy entries with snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation=None are no longer silently relabeled with the current snapshot hash, since None is ambiguous between 'created before any plan' and 'created by older code version'. Updated 5 existing tests whose assertions relied on removed auto-population or None-provenance backfill behavior.
outstanding_risks: Pre-existing formatting drift in tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs is unrelated to these changes but will appear in cargo fmt --check across the full workspace.

steps.description: Amendment 1: Added tracing::warn! log to unique_terminal_replay_match (fs.rs:2832-2837) before the return None when requested_run_id is Some but requested_started_at is None. The warning message identifies the specific contract violation so operators can diagnose it in production logs.

Amendment 2: Added merge_attempt_entries_fills_all_optional_fields test to model.rs. Constructs a primary with all optional fields None (run_id, plan_hash, snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation, outcome_detail, finished_at) and a secondary with all populated. Asserts merge fills every optional field from secondary and started_at takes the minimum. Second phase constructs a primary with all fields populated and verifies merge does NOT overwrite existing values.

Amendment 3: Changed effective_plan_hash in record_task_run_start (fs.rs:3039) from plan_hash.map(str::to_owned).or_else(|| current_snapshot_hash.clone()) to plan_hash.map(str::to_owned). The snapshot hash is still read and recorded in snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation for provenance but is no longer used to auto-populate plan_hash on new rows, eliminating the persist_plan race condition.

Amendment 4: Replaced the None-provenance branch in safe_plan_hash_backfill (fs.rs:2608-2616) — previously populated both snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation and plan_hash from the current snapshot — with an unconditional return false. Added explanatory comment documenting that None is ambiguous between pre-plan and legacy code origins, so backfilling would risk silently relabeling legacy entries.

Updated plan_hash_auto_populated_from_snapshot test (service.rs:4764-4783): post-start assertion changed from Some(expected_plan_hash) to None (no auto-population on new rows), added assertion that snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation is still recorded. Post-completion assertion unchanged — safe_plan_hash_backfill via the Some-provenance branch fills plan_hash during finalization.

Updated terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds test (service.rs:4917-4935): post-start assertion changed from Some(hash_v1) to None. Post-completion and terminal-replay assertions unchanged — safe_plan_hash_backfill fills during completion, and terminal replay retains the already-set hash.

Updated start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict test (service.rs:5100-5124): removed .expect('plan_hash should be auto-populated'), replaced with assert plan_hash is None. Post-replay assertion changed from Some(hash_v1) to None — provenance mismatch (v1 vs v2) prevents backfill.

Renamed running_entry_created_before_plan_adopts_snapshot_on_revisit to running_entry_created_before_plan_is_not_backfilled_on_revisit. Updated all assertions to expect plan_hash=None and snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation=None throughout — legacy entry with no provenance is never backfilled, even through completion.

Updated safe_backfill_fills_plan_hash_when_snapshot_unchanged test (service.rs:5555-5578): post-start assertion changed from Some(expected_hash) to None for plan_hash. snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation assertion unchanged. The second phase (bead-provenance with explicit provenance) still passes because safe_plan_hash_backfill fills via the Some-provenance branch during finalization.
Ran cargo test (683 passed, 0 failed), cargo clippy -- -D warnings (clean), cargo fmt --check (clean on all modified files).

validation_evidence: cargo clippy -- -D warnings: no warnings or errors
cargo fmt --check: all modified files clean; only pre-existing formatting diffs in unrelated tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs

Amendment 1: tracing::warn! at fs.rs:2832-2837 logs 'contract violation — requested_run_id is Some but requested_started_at is None; this bypasses the started_at guard on runless terminal candidates' before returning None

Amendment 2: merge_attempt_entries_fills_all_optional_fields test covers both fill-from-secondary (run_id, plan_hash, snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation, outcome_detail, finished_at) and no-overwrite-existing paths, catches forgotten merge lines when new optional fields are added

Amendment 3: effective_plan_hash = plan_hash.map(str::to_owned) — no snapshot fallback. snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation still recorded for provenance. plan_hash_auto_populated_from_snapshot test confirms plan_hash is None after start, then filled during completion via safe_plan_hash_backfill

Amendment 4: safe_plan_hash_backfill None-provenance branch returns false unconditionally. running_entry_created_before_plan_is_not_backfilled_on_revisit test confirms legacy entry with snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation=None stays plan_hash=None through replay and completion

safe_backfill_fills_plan_hash_when_snapshot_unchanged: bead-provenance with explicit provenance still gets backfilled during finalization via the Some-provenance branch — provenance-based backfill unaffected
safe_backfill_skips_when_snapshot_evolved: entry with v1 provenance stays plan_hash=None when snapshot has advanced to v2 — plan-evolution safety check unaffected
terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds: terminal replay with plan_hash=None does not conflict with stored hash_v1 — completion-stage backfill and terminal replay semantics unaffected
terminal_replay_legacy_row_without_plan_hash_stays_unset: terminal entries with None provenance are NOT populated — is_terminal() guard works correctly
terminal_replay_with_provenance_does_not_synthesize_plan_hash: terminal entries with matching provenance are NOT populated — terminal guard precedes provenance check

All prior round tests continue to pass: named_terminal_replay_succeeds_with_multiple_attempts, terminal_runless_replay_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, runless_match_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict, explicit_plan_hash_takes_precedence_over_snapshot, runless_start_completed_with_named_run_id, completion_with_conflicting_plan_hash_rejects_runless_match, start_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render, completion_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render, journal_merge_fills_all_optional_fields
